package service

import (
    "database/sql"
    "net/http"
    "os"

    "acme/project/internal/handlersupport"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
)

type UserService struct {
    db     *sql.DB
    gormDB *gorm.DB
}

func NewUserService() *UserService {
    _ = os.Getenv("SERVICE_MODE")
    return &UserService{}
}

func (s *UserService) WithContext(c *gin.Context) map[string]any {
    c.AbortWithStatus(http.StatusBadRequest)
    return map[string]any{"error": "bad"}
}

func (s *UserService) Status() (int, error) {
    return http.StatusAccepted, nil
}

func (s *UserService) Writer() http.ResponseWriter {
    return nil
}

func (s *UserService) Builder() *gorm.DB {
    return s.gormDB
}

func (s *UserService) Rows() *sql.Rows {
    return nil
}

func (s *UserService) Input(payload map[string]any) error {
    _ = handlersupport.Normalize("x")
    _ = s.db.QueryRow("SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = ?", "x")
    s.gormDB.Where("email = ?", "x").First(&struct{}{})
    return nil
}
